description: Celulosa Argentina S.A. operates in the forest industry sector in Argentina, Uruguay, and internationally. The company offers printing and writing paper, tissue paper, and packaging paper under the BOREAL, BOREALCEL, BOOKCEL, SPRING CEL, PAINTCEL, and PAMPA brands. It is also involved in eucalyptus Pulp, forests, wood, and distribution business. In addition, the company provides paper, cardboard and paperboard, and value-added products. Celulosa Argentina S.A. was founded in 1929 and is based in Capitan Bermudez, Argentina.
